Foreign learners may also make mistakes with points of grammar that do not The company has doubled it's profits this year. (should be its profits) And many people have trouble with spelling and punctuation.

You're being very authoritative. (mistake for 'authoritarian’ ) or confuses it with another word.

Somebody can use a word wrongly because he or she is unsure of its meaning, He works in Wildlife Conversation -I mean Conservation.

People sometimes make slips of the tongue when they are talking.
